title: Tesla spending skyrockets as Cybercab, Semi, Megapack production timeline slips | TechCrunch
summary: Meanwhile, Tesla had negative free cash flow of $1 billion in the second quarter, a stark change from the $1.44 billion in positive free cash flow it reported last quarter and the $146 million it had in the same period last year.
